steps.title: Match subject and tense
steps.content: The subject is the singular person Farouk El-Baz. The appositive phrase a geologist and space scientist describes him but does not make the subject plural, and the time phrase points to the past.

steps.title: Reject agreement errors
steps.content: Choice A and Choice D are plural verb forms, so they do not agree with the singular subject. Choice C is also plural and does not fit the simple past context. The answer is B.
